SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.expander

Class MapTurboExpanderCompressor

java.lang.Object
neqsim.util.NamedBaseClass
neqsim.process.SimulationBaseClass
neqsim.process.equipment.ProcessEquipmentBaseClass
neqsim.process.equipment.expander.MapTurboExpanderCompressor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Runnable, ProcessEquipmentInterface, ProcessElementInterface, SimulationInterface, NamedInterface
public class MapTurboExpanderCompressor extends ProcessEquipmentBaseClass
MapTurboExpanderCompressor class.

An alternative single-shaft turboexpander-compressor (companding machine) model that couples a real Expander and a real Compressor on a common shaft. Unlike TurboExpanderCompressor, which uses bespoke U/C and Q/N curve-fit correction factors, this model reuses NeqSim's existing compressor performance-map machinery (CompressorChart or CompressorChartKhader2015) for the compressor side. The two machines are coupled through a mechanical (shaft/bearing) efficiency and solved so that the shaft power produced by the expander equals the power absorbed by the compressor at a common shaft speed.

This is conceptually equivalent to the Atlas Copco Mafi-Trench / River City Engineering EC-OD off-design rating utility for Aspen HYSYS, but built on the open NeqSim chart classes so that the compressor map can account for changing gas composition (via the Mach-number based CompressorChartKhader2015).

Two operating modes are supported:

  • MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode.SPECIFIED_PRESSURES – both the expander outlet pressure and the compressor outlet pressure are specified. The two machines are solved independently and the shaft power balance residual is reported. Useful at the design point.
  • MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode.BALANCED_SPEED – rigorous off-design rating. The expander outlet pressure is specified and the compressor uses a performance map. The common shaft speed is solved so that the compressor power equals the shaft power delivered by the expander; the compressor discharge pressure is then an output of the calculation.
Version:
$Id: $Id
Author:
esol

      name - name of the unit operation
      expanderInletStream - high-pressure feed to the expander
      compressorInletStream - feed to the brake compressor

    • getExpander

      Returns:
      the Expander instance

      Get the brake compressor side of the machine.
      Returns:
      the Compressor instance

      public void setExpanderOutletPressure(double pressure)
      Set the expander discharge pressure.
      Parameters:
      pressure - expander outlet pressure in bara

    • setExpanderIsentropicEfficiency

      public void setExpanderIsentropicEfficiency(double efficiency)
      Set the expander isentropic efficiency.
      Parameters:
      efficiency - isentropic efficiency as a fraction (0-1)

    • setCompressorOutletPressure

      public void setCompressorOutletPressure(double pressure)
      Set the compressor discharge pressure. Only used in MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode.SPECIFIED_PRESSURES mode; in MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode.BALANCED_SPEED mode the compressor discharge pressure is an output.
      Parameters:
      pressure - compressor outlet pressure in bara

    • setMechanicalEfficiency

      public void setMechanicalEfficiency(double efficiency)
      Set the mechanical (shaft transmission) efficiency.
      Parameters:
      efficiency - mechanical efficiency as a fraction (0-1)

    • getMechanicalEfficiency

      public double getMechanicalEfficiency()
      Get the mechanical (shaft transmission) efficiency.
      Returns:
      mechanical efficiency as a fraction (0-1)

    • setBearingLossPower

      public void setBearingLossPower(double powerWatt)
      Set the parasitic bearing/seal power loss.
      Parameters:
      powerWatt - bearing loss in Watt (greater than or equal to 0)

    • getBearingLossPower

      public double getBearingLossPower()
      Get the parasitic bearing/seal power loss.
      Returns:
      bearing loss in Watt

    • setShaftMode

      public void setShaftMode(MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode mode)
      Set the shaft solution mode.
      Parameters:
      mode - the MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode to use

    • getShaftMode

      public MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode getShaftMode()
      Get the shaft solution mode.
      Returns:
      the active MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode

    • setShaftSpeedBounds

      public void setShaftSpeedBounds(double minSpeed, double maxSpeed)
      Set the lower and upper bounds for the shaft speed search in MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode.BALANCED_SPEED mode.
      Parameters:
      minSpeed - lower bound in RPM (0 = use compressor chart minimum)
      maxSpeed - upper bound in RPM (0 = use compressor chart maximum)

    • getShaftSpeed

      public double getShaftSpeed()
      Get the solved common shaft speed.
      Returns:
      shaft speed in RPM

    • getAvailableShaftPower

      public double getAvailableShaftPower()
      Get the shaft power delivered to the compressor (after mechanical losses).
      Returns:
      available shaft power in Watt

    • getConsumedCompressorPower

      public double getConsumedCompressorPower()
      Get the compressor absorbed power.
      Returns:
      consumed compressor power in Watt

    • getPowerBalanceResidual

      public double getPowerBalanceResidual()
      Get the shaft power balance residual (available minus consumed). A value close to zero in MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode.BALANCED_SPEED mode indicates a converged solution.
      Returns:
      power balance residual in Watt

    • isSpeedLimited

      public boolean isSpeedLimited()
      Indicates whether the shaft speed was pegged at one of the search bounds (i.e. the power balance could not be satisfied within the allowed speed range).
      Returns:
      true if the shaft speed was limited by a bound

    • getOperatingStatus

      public MapTurboExpanderCompressor.OperatingStatus getOperatingStatus()
      Get the operating status from the latest MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode.BALANCED_SPEED solution.
      Returns:
      the MapTurboExpanderCompressor.OperatingStatus

    • isFeasible

      public boolean isFeasible()
      Indicates whether the machine has a physically feasible balanced operating point. In MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode.BALANCED_SPEED mode the machine is feasible only when an interior shaft-speed solution exists (MapTurboExpanderCompressor.OperatingStatus.BALANCED); an MapTurboExpanderCompressor.OperatingStatus.UNDER_POWER_SURGE status corresponds to the low-pressure turndown / surge limit where the brake compressor would have to recycle. In MapTurboExpanderCompressor.ShaftMode.SPECIFIED_PRESSURES mode the result is always considered feasible (the residual is reported separately).
      Returns:
      true if a balanced operating point was found

    • getExpanderOutStream

      public StreamInterface getExpanderOutStream()
      Get the expander outlet stream.
      Returns:
      the cold expander discharge stream

    • getCompressorOutStream

      public StreamInterface getCompressorOutStream()
      Get the compressor outlet stream.
      Returns:
      the compressor discharge stream

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Build a map of the key machine results for reporting and serialization.
      Returns:
      an ordered map of result names to values

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serialize the key machine results to a pretty-printed JSON string.
      Specified by:
      toJson in interface ProcessEquipmentInterface
      Overrides:
      toJson in class ProcessEquipmentBaseClass
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the machine results

    • compressorPowerAtSpeed

      private double compressorPowerAtSpeed(double speed, UUID id)
      Compute the compressor absorbed power at a given shaft speed using the compressor performance map.
      Parameters:
      speed - shaft speed in RPM
      id - calculation identifier
      Returns:
      compressor absorbed power in Watt

    • run

      public void run(UUID id)
      In this method all thermodynamic and unit operations will be calculated in a steady state calculation.
      Parameters:
      id - UUID

    • getInletStreams

      public List<StreamInterface> getInletStreams()
      Returns all inlet streams connected to this equipment. Subclasses override to report their specific inlets. Used by graph builders, DEXPI export, and auto-instrumentation to discover topology without instanceof checks.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of inlet streams (empty by default)

    • getOutletStreams

      public List<StreamInterface> getOutletStreams()
      Returns all outlet streams produced by this equipment. Subclasses override to report their specific outlets. Used by graph builders, DEXPI export, and auto-instrumentation to discover topology without instanceof checks.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of outlet streams (empty by default)
